dialogue.line: Ah ah ah, caught you're ass lackin!
You thought this was a game huh?
Well, sorry to burst your TINY little bubble but it ain't gonna be THAT easy, punk!
Think you're all tough and stuff? You ain't worth a penny!
That weird lemon dude was insanely slow.
I don't think he even moved a muscle when we ran.
We would have escaped if it wasn't for YOU!
PIPE down demon! Sure he MAY be slow and all that jazz.
But what you ain't account for are these bullets!
See if you can outrun THEM!
